title: search trough all emails-and-activites
excerpt:
We switched from writing update to writing activities in the emails-and-activites section. A downside we experienced now, is that unlike updates, activities can not be found using the general search of monday.com. 
Pleas…

posts.author: Amarin (Amarin)
posts.cookedHtml:
We switched from writing update to writing activities in the emails-and-activites section. A downside we experienced now, is that unlike updates, activities can not be found using the general search of monday.com.
Please add the category activities into mondays wonderful “Search Everything …” tool.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Amarin now you can, I made an app Search Emails & Activities
